name: add-function
instruction: Add a new function `find_category(products: List[Product], target: String) -> String` that looks up a product by name and returns its category. If the product is not found, return `"unknown"`. Follow the same coding style as `find_price`. Keep all existing functions unchanged.
layer3_hint: Available: `list.find(xs, (x) => bool)` returns `Option[A]`. Record field access: `p.category`. `list.map(xs, (x) => y)` transforms each element.
